ddls:
CREATE TABLE "planning_problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning problem */,
  "problem_file" TEXT /* File associated with the planning problem */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of planning problem (e.g., islands-0) */,
  "solver" TEXT /* Solver used to solve the problem */,
  "planning_time" REAL /* Time taken to plan the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the problem (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the problem */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_problems_solver FOREIGN KEY ("solver") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_problems_problem_type FOREIGN KEY ("problem_type") REFERENCES problem_types ("problem_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning outcome */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning problem the outcome belongs to */,
  "singles_outcome_planning_call" INTEGER /* Number of singles outcome planning calls */,
  "all_outcome_planning_call" INTEGER /* Number of all outcome planning calls */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was last updated */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the planning calls */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_outcomes_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES planning_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solvable_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solvable state */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning problem the state belongs to */,
  "unsolvable_states" INTEGER /* Number of unsolvable states */,
  "solvable" INTEGER /* Solvable state (1 or 0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the solvable states */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solvable_states_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES planning_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning problem the policy belongs to */,
  "policy_length" INTEGER /* Length of the policy */,
  "plan_length" INTEGER /* Length of the plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the policies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES planning_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solvers" (
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver */,
  "solver_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the solver was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the solver was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the solver */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the solver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_types" (
  "problem_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem type */,
  "problem_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem type was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the problem type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_problem_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning problem the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the planning problem file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., pddl, txt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_problem_files_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES planning_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning problem being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the planning problem */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the planning problem was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES planning_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
